name: aistats-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for AISTATS submissions: topic fit, OpenReview submission checks, author discussion, camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, supplementary material, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in official AISTATS 2026 CFP, OpenReview group, PMLR proceedings pages, and Code of Conduct checked on 2026-06-01.
